zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervase Clifton於大約1242年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Gervase Clifton21歲，母親Ysmenia Alvideleg18歲。他於1271年與Amfelisia Sampson在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾內瓦可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1324年享年84歲。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervase Clifton was born about 1242, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gervase Clifton, was 21 and his mother, Ysmenia Alvideleg, was 18. He married Amfelisia Sampson in 1271, in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1324, at the age of 84.

Il a épousé Amfelisia Sampson en 1271, à Newark, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1324, à l’âge de 84 ans.

Er hat 1271 in Newark, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Amfelisia Sampson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1324 im Alter von 84 Jahren.

ko.Saint Mary's Church, Clifton, Nottingham: 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함 세인트 메리 테 버긴
ko.lifeSummary: Gervase Clifton(이)가 대략 1242년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gervase Clifton(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ysmenia Alvideleg(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 뉴아르크에서 Amfelisia Sampson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1324년 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Saint Mary's Church, Clifton, Nottingham: сеинт мэри т виргин, ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervase Clifton родился около 1242 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gervase Clifton было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ysmenia Alvideleg, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Amfelisia Sampson в 1271 г. в местности нюарк, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1324 г. в возрасте 84 лет.
